original_text:
### Email Canvas & Grid **[GENERAL — not specified in guide; Solstice email baseline]**
- Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
- Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
- Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).
- **Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
- **Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
  - Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
  - Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
- Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum.

relations.note: The CTA treatment applies to the primary CTA whose section-level count is limited by the cardinality rule.

rules.intent: Ensure independently assembled email sections align and reflow consistently.
rules.rule_text: Use a fixed, centered 600px email canvas. Sections render edge-to-edge at 600px for clean butt-joint assembly; full-bleed imagery and gradient backgrounds may extend across that width, while their text retains 24px side insets. At the 480px mobile breakpoint, all multi-column layouts collapse to one column. Use the 12-column planning grid with practical one-column, 50/50 two-column, or approximately 40/60 image/text layouts.

quotes: **Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Maintain consistent rhythm and gap-free modular email assembly.
rules.rule_text: Use an 8px vertical-rhythm base: all padding and margins are multiples of 8px. Each section owns 32px top and bottom internal padding; do not place external margins between sections, so assembly stacks with zero gaps. Set heading-to-body and paragraph-to-paragraph gaps to 16px, body-to-callout or CTA gaps to 24px, and image-to-caption gaps to 8px.

quotes: Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

rules.intent: Provide recognizable, accessible CTA treatments that meet the brand's minimum tap-target requirement.
rules.rule_text: Use contrast-checked CTAs: the primary CTA has a Brand Blue (#00529b) background with White (#ffffff) text, Nunito Sans Bold at 16px, 14px 32px padding, a fully rounded 24px pill radius, and a minimum 48px clickable height. The secondary CTA uses a White (#ffffff) background, a 2px Brand Blue (#00529b) border, Brand Blue (#00529b) text, and the same metrics.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Keep section-level actions focused and visually unambiguous.
rules.rule_text: Each section may contain no more than one primary CTA.

| Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette] | ** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic).
